bug_found.description: Manual Spearman implementation does not handle ties, producing ρ=-0.8913 instead of correct ρ≈0.03

e3_d2039.conclusion: Ratio is a single-state outlier; multi-state median is ~0.80

verdict: Core numerical experiments are reproducible and correct. The Spearman correlation bug invalidates the p-1 smoothness → DPRT advantage causal chain.
